headline: 3 Nasdaq 100 Stocks on Our Watchlist
summary: The Nasdaq 100 (^NDX) is packed with high-growth companies, and while the market is competitive, some are pulling ahead. A handful of standout businesses are continuing to scale, delivering strong financials and market leadership.

headline: Baron Global Opportunity Fund Increased Its Holding in CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD)

headline: Tech Chips Lead Wall Street Rebound as Broadcom Crushes Estimates

headline: CrowdStrike and Schwarz Digits Partner to Deliver AI-Native and Sovereign Cybersecurity Platform on STACKIT
summary: AUSTIN, Texas & NECKARSULM, Germany, March 05, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) and Schwarz Digits today announced a long-term strategic partnership to bring the CrowdStrike Falcon® cybersecurity platform to STACKIT, Schwarz Digits’ sovereign cloud infrastructure. This collaboration will deliver the AI-native Falcon platform with full attack path visibility on a platform fully operated within the EU on STACKIT, enabling enterprises and public institutions to meet Europe’s data sovereignty requir

headline: CrowdStrike’s Record ARR And AI Security Push Reshape Growth Story
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) reported record fiscal 2026 results, surpassing US$5b in annual recurring revenue. The company posted its first GAAP profit in Q4 alongside record net new ARR, reflecting operational execution at scale. CrowdStrike launched new products, including FalconID, aimed at zero friction, AI resistant authentication as AI driven attacks increase. Partnerships with VAST Data and NVIDIA, plus new integrations with Qualtrics, extend CrowdStrike's role in securing...
